idea: XLK momentum surge after 3-day volume spike

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices and volume for XLK

behavior: A sudden 50%+ increase in trading volume over 3 days often precedes a momentum-driven price surge in technology stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Heavy volume signals renewed buying interest in technology sector ETFs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if 3-day average volume is at least 50% higher than prior 20-day average volume and price closes up on the 3rd day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if price falls below 3-day moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: XLK trades daily with volume variations that often surpass 50% spikes multiple times a month.

data.source: Yahoo Finance weekly closing prices for XLE

behavior: After a weekly drawdown exceeding 5%, XLE often rebounds sharply the following week as energy prices stabilize.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector is mean reverting after sharp short-term pullbacks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on weekly close if weekly drawdown is greater than 5% from prior week's close
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 2 weeks or if weekly gain turns negative

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly drawdowns >5% in XLE occur multiple times a year, triggering timely rebound trades.

idea: XLV Google Trends flu search spike

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'flu symptoms' search term

behavior: Rising flu-related searches often precede increased healthcare sector activity and defensive buying in XLV.

market_impact.rationale: Healthcare ETFs benefit from increased public health concerns.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if weekly flu symptom search interest increases by 20%+ compared to prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if search interest declines for 2 consecutive weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal flu cycles and search interest spikes occur annually and within shorter windows.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily price volatility for XLB

behavior: Periods of low volatility contraction in materials ETFs often precede explosive directional moves.

market_impact.rationale: Breakouts from volatility compression signal new trends in materials stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long when 10-day volatility drops below 50% of 60-day volatility and next day price breaks above prior 5-day high
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 days or if price closes below 5-day low

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Volatility contractions and breakouts occur regularly in XLB throughout the year.

idea: XLU weekly cold snap weather correlation

data.source: Open-Meteo daily temperature data aggregated weekly for US Northeast

behavior: Significant weekly temperature drops often increase utility demand, lifting XLU prices.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities benefit from cold weather-driven energy consumption spikes.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if weekly average temperature falls by more than 5°F compared to prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 2 weeks or if temperature stabilizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Cold snaps in the Northeast recur each season, providing timely signals.

idea: XLY daily retail volume surge on low volatility day

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily volume and price data for XLY

behavior: A sudden volume spike on a day of unusually low price volatility may indicate retail accumulation before a breakout.

market_impact.rationale: Retail sector ETFs respond to retail investor buying interest.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if daily volume is 40% above 20-day average while daily price range (high-low) is below 20-day average range
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if price drops below entry price

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Such volume/volatility divergences occur frequently during retail consolidation phases.

idea: XLF weekly Fed funds rate surprise reaction

data.source: FRED weekly effective Fed funds rate data

behavior: Unexpected Fed funds rate moves often trigger rapid financial sector ETF reactions.

market_impact.rationale: Financial stocks react negatively to surprise rate hikes.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if weekly Fed funds rate increases by more than 10 basis points unexpectedly
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if XLF outperforms SPY over 5 days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Fed funds data updates weekly and rate hikes can occur within 30 days.

data.source: USGS daily earthquake activity counts near US urban centers

behavior: Increased local earthquake events tend to temporarily pressure real estate ETFs in affected regions.

market_impact.rationale: Real estate valuations are sensitive to perceived natural disaster risks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily earthquake counts in top 5 US metro areas exceed prior 7-day average by 200%
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if earthquake activity normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake clusters can happen irregularly but often multiple times a year.

idea: XLC weekly Google Trends surge in '5G rollout'

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for '5G rollout' search term

behavior: Rising interest in 5G deployment correlates with communication sector ETF strength.

market_impact.rationale: Increased tech infrastructure interest boosts communication services stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if weekly search interest in '5G rollout' increases by 25%+ vs prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if search interest declines 2 weeks consecutively

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: 5G related search interest fluctuates regularly as new rollouts happen.

idea: XLP daily grocery price inflation spike

data.source: FRED monthly CPI for food at home interpolated to daily estimates

behavior: Sudden increases in grocery price inflation pressure consumer staples costs but may boost XLP as pricing power returns.

market_impact.rationale: Staples benefit from pricing power during inflation spikes.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if daily interpolated food CPI increases by more than 0.1% from prior day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 days or if CPI growth slows

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Food CPI data updates monthly but interpolation allows detection of rapid recent rises.

data.source: FRED monthly industrial production index interpolated weekly

behavior: Acceleration in industrial production growth often precedes strength in industrial sector ETFs.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial output gains drive industrial sector earnings.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if weekly interpolated industrial production growth rate accelerates by 0.5%+ compared to prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if growth decelerates

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Industrial production shows measurable weekly acceleration patterns after monthly releases.

behavior: Unexpected daily surges in electricity demand tend to lift utilities ETFs as prices and revenues rise.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities revenue and prices respond to electricity consumption spikes.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if daily electricity demand increases by more than 3% versus prior day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 trading days or if demand reverts

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Electricity demand fluctuates daily with weather and economic activity causing frequent spikes.

idea: XLF intraday volatility spike followed by weekly fade

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily and weekly volatility for XLF

behavior: A sharp intraday volatility spike on a single day often leads to a fade or mean reversion over the following week.

market_impact.rationale: Financial sector tends to mean revert after volatility shocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily intraday volatility (high-low/close) exceeds 3% and weekly close is below prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 1 week or if weekly close rises above prior week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Volatility spikes and weekly fades happen regularly in financial ETFs.

idea: XLRE daily new EV charger installations spike

data.source: Openchargemap daily EV charger counts aggregated nationally

behavior: Surges in new EV charger installations signal rising real estate demand for commercial charging infrastructure.

market_impact.rationale: Real estate related to EV infrastructure benefits from installation growth.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if daily new charger installs increase by more than 30% versus 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or if installs revert

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV charger rollout is accelerating and often shows short bursts of installation surges.

idea: XLB weekly RSS news count spike on commodity shortage

data.source: RSS news feed counts for commodity shortage keywords

behavior: News spikes mentioning commodity shortages tend to lift materials sector ETFs as prices rise.

market_impact.rationale: Materials ETFs benefit from supply constraints priced in by markets.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if weekly RSS news count on 'commodity shortage' keywords increases by 50%+ over prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if news count declines

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Commodity shortage news stories have frequent bursts especially during supply chain disruptions.
